author: Daniel Anderson
description: A visual workspace built on Obsidian's Canvas format: nestable freeform boards, icon tile grids, kanban boards, sticky notes, checklists, columns, drawing with pen, labels, reactions, and more.. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Daniel Anderson
manifest.description: A visual workspace built on the Canvas format: nestable freeform boards, icon tile grids, kanban boards, sticky notes, checklists, columns, drawing with pen and highlighter, labels, reactions, and more.
manifest.name: Visual Notes

name: Visual Notes
